description: Canonical directory paths for each content type, relative to the data repo root. validate.py, build.py, and all future tooling read from here instead of hardcoding strings. To move a content type to a new directory, change its value here and update the consuming scripts in the same commit.

notes.outlets: Points to the per-file records subdirectory, not the outlets/ parent. The manifest lives at outlets/records/_manifest.json.
notes.memos: Reserved for the counter-memo track (MEMO- records). Directory will be created when the ANA-/MEMO- schemas are authored through ADDING_A_FIELD.md.
notes.analysis: Reserved for analysis records (ANA-). Same gate as memos.
notes.path_format: Relative to data_dir (the repo root passed to validate.py / build.py). No leading or trailing slashes.
